title: AirAsia India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: AirAsia India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
AirAsia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About AirAsia India:
AirAsia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia India!
